leadText: The Genius Feather (Japanese: ちりょくのハネ Intelligence Feather), known as Genius Wing prior to Pokémon Sword and Shield, is a type of medicine introduced in Generation V. It is a feather that slightly increases the Special Attack of a Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, adds 1 Special Attack EV to the target Pokémon per use. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. The Genius Feather is consumed upon use and cannot be used in battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E An item for use on a Pokémon. It slightly increases the base Sp. Atk stat of a single Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA An item for use on a Pokémon. It slightly increases the Sp. Atk base points of a single Pokémon. S V An item to be used on a Pokémon. This feather slightly increases base points for a Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat.
